code.text: Bacteria identified in Blood by Culture

note.text:
Nucleic acid test for the detection of Staphylococcus spp.,
S. aureus, S. epidermidis, S. lugdunensis, Streptococcus
spp., S. pneumoniae, S. pyogenes, S. agalactiae,
S. anginosus group, Enterococcus faecalis, Enterococcus
faecium, mec-A mediated methicillin resistance, and
vanA/vanB mediated Vancomycin resistance was performed and
was NEGATIVE for all targets tested.

*****IGRRECTED REPORT*****
Previous report of  was incorrect.
The correct report of YEAST PRESENT ON GRAM STAIN
was called  and texted to ALLISON CABRERA
